title: MineDave - Plants & Zombies Modpack
description: PvZ Modpack - Survival & QoL! Plants vs Zombies gameplay with base defense, quests, claims, minimap, improved world generation, and more!
body:
# 🌻 MineDave 🌱 - A Plants & Zombies Modpack
A unique Minecraft experience inspired by Plants vs Zombies, where survival, strategy, and exploration come together. Discover plants across the world, defend yourself from dangerous zombies, and progress through a carefully curated modded experience.

# CORE GAMEPLAY:
🌱 > Discover and collect plants across different biomes

🧟 > Survive against custom zombie threats

🧠 > Strategy and positioning are key to survival

🌍 > World & Exploration

🌄 > Terralith world generation

🧭 > Nature’s Compass

# MODPACK FEATURES
This modpack focuses on quality of life, immersion, and exploration:

## CORE MODS
🌻 > Plants & Zombies → Core gameplay mechanics, plants and zombies

📜 > Daily Quests & Rewards → Progression and rewards system

🏠 > Open Parties & Claims → Land protection and multiplayer systems

🧭 > Xaero’s Minimap & World Map

🎁 > Starter Kit system

🌿 > Immersion & Visuals

**🌐 > Official Modpack server: MineDave**

👉 This modpack is designed to be played on singleplayer but you can also hop in the MineDave server for the full experience. The server adds exclusive systems not included in the modpack:
## SERVER ADDONS
🌷 **New plants**
→ Explore to get around 5 new plants!

🔄 **Dynamic Plant Respawning**
→ Plants regrow over time near players, keeping the world alive

🎁 **Lootr Integration**
→ Each player gets their own loot from chests

🌻 **Crazy Dave**
→ A unique trader with rotating offers using Sun

💰 Custom economy and progression systems

📦 Events, rewards, and server-exclusive content

🏆 Multiplayer features with teams and land claiming

⚡ Constant updates and new mechanics
